'''Rainbow Berry Bie''' was an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Pie/Legends|pie]] made from [[Rainbow berry|rainbow berries]]. The Ewoks of the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]] made and [[Diet/Legends|consumed]] the pie for [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village's]] [[Harvest Moon Feast]].<ref name="surprise" />

The Ewok [[Zephee/Legends|Zephee]] baked the pie for one such feast. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the [[Color/Legends|rainbow]] [[Berry/Legends|berries]] had been hard to come by, but Zephee was still able to make her pie.<ref name="surprise" /> A plethora of the pies<ref name="Insider 74">{{InsiderCite|74|Wasaka Berries and Monster Ships: Star Wars Storybook 101|Wasaka Berries and Monster Ships: ''Star Wars'' Storybook 101}}</ref> were served that [[Local day/Legends|night]], and all of the Ewoks lined up happily to get some.<ref name="surprise" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Rainbow_berry_pie.png|thumb|right|76px|A rainbow berry pie in ''Tiny Death Star'']]
Rainbow Berry Bie first appeared in the [[1984]] young readers book ''[[The Baby Ewoks' Picnic Surprise]]'', written by [[Melinda Luke]].<ref name="surprise" /> "[[Wasaka Berries and Monster Ships: Star Wars Storybook 101|Wasaka Berries and Monster Ships]]," an article written by [[Craig Robert Carey|Craig R. Carey]] and [[Victor Wertz|Vic Wertz]] and published in the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine's [[Star Wars Insider 74|seventy-fourth issue]]<ref name="Insider 74" /> on [[February 24]], [[2004]],<ref name="SWI date">{{SWArchive|url=community/news/2004/01/news20040126.html|text=Clone Trooper Front and Center in ''Insider'' #74}}</ref> misspells it as "rainbow- berry pie."

The pie later made an appearance in the [[Canon|non-canon]] [[Star Wars video games|mobile game]] ''[[Star Wars: Tiny Death Star]]'', which was developed by [[Disney Mobile]] in collaboration with [[LucasArts]] and [[NimbleBit]] and released in [[2013]]. In the game, the pie was pictured as purple with a brown crust and could be purchased from a food level called "Ewok Sweets" for one [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]].<ref name="TDS">''[[Star Wars: Tiny Death Star]]''</ref>
